chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 511 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 24.10.2024 On 19.09.2024, the following order was passed;- “4.Learned counsel for applicant requires time in order to make his submissions as to why the remedy available u/s 200 Cr.P.C, may not be available to him as apparently the matter does not require investigation. As time has been sought, matter is adjourned.” Today neither applicant nor his Counsel has appeared to pursue this matter, which reflects that applicant and his Counsel are not interested to pursue the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge ARBROHI
